_comment: Ground-truth concepts for session_small.jsonl + notes_small/. Hand-derived from the fixture content. Test assertions use these as membership checks (not exact-match) since LLM extraction phrasing varies.

concepts.name: Kuzu
concepts.rationale: Embedded graph DB chosen for the KG layer. Named explicitly in both session and notes.

concepts.name: SQLite
concepts.rationale: Rejected candidate, explicitly considered and discarded.

concepts.name: Bitemporal Knowledge Graph
concepts.rationale: Central topic across session and notes. Valid_time + transaction_time.

concepts.name: KG store choice
concepts.rationale: Decision frame: which backend for the knowledge graph.

concepts.name: ChromaDB
concepts.rationale: Vector store, kept alongside Kuzu. Mentioned in both fixtures.

concepts.name: ConceptStore (legacy)
concepts.rationale: SQLite-based store marked deprecated; tension between migration speed and no-new-writes guard.

expected_relationships.why: paired stores at the storage layer
